name: Freescale Semiconductor, Inc.
description: Freescale Semiconductor, Inc. was a global leader in the design and manufacture of embedded semiconductors for the automotive, consumer, industrial, and networking markets. Originally a division of Motorola, Freescale was spun off as an independent company in 2004 before being acquired by NXP Semiconductors in 2015. The company specialized in microcontrollers, microprocessors, sensors, and analog integrated circuits, providing essential technology for advanced driver assistance systems, smart devices, and secure connectivity solutions.
